parameters.content:
## AWIN New Publisher Alert

Polls the AWIN API every 2 hours for pending publisher applications and sends a Gmail alert when new ones are found.

**Required Variables ($vars):**
- `AWIN_API_KEY`
- `AWIN_ADVERTISER_ID`
- `ALERT_EMAIL_TO`
- `ALERT_EMAIL_FROM`
- `GOOGLE_SHEET_ID` (optional)

**Required Credentials:**
- Gmail OAuth2
- Google Sheets OAuth2
- (HTTP uses Header Auth via $vars)

### 1. Triggers

- **Schedule Trigger** runs the workflow every 2 hours.
- **Manual Trigger** is provided for testing without waiting for the cron.

### 2. Fetch & Filter

- **HTTP Request** calls AWIN with `relationshipStatus=pending`.
- **Filter Already Notified** removes publishers we have already alerted on (deduplication via Workflow Static Data).

### 3. Notify

- **IF** stops the workflow when there are no new publishers.
- **Format Email Body** builds the HTML and the dynamic subject line.
- **Gmail** sends the alert.

### 4. Persist

- **Update Notified IDs** writes the new IDs to Workflow Static Data so they will not be alerted again.
- **Google Sheets** appends a row per new publisher to the tracking sheet.

### Error Handling

Attach this workflow as the **Error Workflow** in Settings, or rely on the inline **Error Trigger** below. The Gmail node sends a one-line failure alert with the error message.

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (every 2h)
nodes.notes: Fires every 2 hours to poll AWIN.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger (testing)
nodes.notes: Use this trigger to test the workflow without waiting for the schedule.

nodes.name: Fetch Pending Publishers
nodes.notes: GET AWIN pending publishers. Auth via header using $vars.AWIN_API_KEY.

nodes.name: Filter Already Notified
nodes.notes: Removes publishers whose IDs are already in workflow static data.

nodes.name: Has New Publishers?
nodes.notes: TRUE if at least one new publisher; FALSE stops the workflow.

nodes.name: No New Publishers (Stop)
nodes.notes: Terminates the run when nothing new was returned by AWIN.

nodes.name: Format Email Body
nodes.notes: Builds htmlBody and subject. Escapes user-provided fields to prevent HTML injection.

nodes.name: Send Alert Email
nodes.notes: Sends the formatted HTML alert. Replace credential reference on import.

nodes.name: Update Notified IDs
nodes.notes: Persists alerted publisher IDs to workflow static data.

nodes.name: Expand for Sheets
nodes.notes: Splits the batch into one item per publisher so Google Sheets appends one row each.

nodes.name: Log New Publishers
nodes.notes: Appends one row per new publisher. Sheet must have a header row with the named columns.

nodes.name: Workflow Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires when this workflow is set as the Error Workflow for another (or itself in Settings).

parameters.subject: ⚠️ AWIN Workflow Error

nodes.name: Send Error Email
nodes.notes: Sends a plain-text failure notification with the underlying error message.
